prompt: 第二轮新老交替不一致发现，只找未登记或更尖锐的新问题

dimensions.name: release-version-package-drift
dimensions.criteria: package versions, changelog, release docs, publish scripts, rc gate scripts, workspace manifests disagree

dimensions.name: generated-managed-artifact-drift
dimensions.criteria: checked-in generated client artifacts differ from templates/canonical or installer behavior

dimensions.name: tests-snapshots-runtime-drift
dimensions.criteria: tests/snapshots protect old behavior or miss current runtime public surfaces

dimensions.name: config-schema-doc-i18n-drift
dimensions.criteria: schema defaults, config docs, i18n strings, and runtime behavior disagree

dimensions.name: knowledge-store-migration-tail-drift
dimensions.criteria: store-era knowledge paths, event names, ids, pending/review flows, migration docs retain incompatible legacy assumptions
